---
title: "Father Henry James Coleridge"
---

## Father Henry James Coleridge

**Dates:** (1822-1893)

### Description

Son of Sir John Taylor Coleridge, brother of Mary Coleridge

### Biography

He converted to Rome (1852) and became a Jesuit; he was editor of <i>The Month</i> 1865-81. [ODNB]

### Letters

- Letter from May 14, 1848

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
